posts.read_desc: Can view post list and details in admin page.
posts.write_desc: Can create posts and edit/delete all posts in admin page.
posts.read-secret_desc: Can view secret posts without entering password.

comments.read_desc: Can view all comments in admin page.
comments.write_desc: Can create comments and edit/delete all comments in admin page.

attachments.upload_desc: Can attach files to posts and delete all attachments.

admin.manage_desc: Can manage others' posts/comments, blind, restore, and set notices.

posts.read_desc: Can view post list and details.
posts.write_desc: Can create posts and edit/delete own posts.
posts.read-secret_desc: Can view secret posts without entering password.

comments.write_desc: Can create comments and edit/delete own comments.

attachments.upload_desc: Can attach files to posts and delete own attachments.

permissions.manager_desc: Can blind, restore, and delete others' posts/comments in user page.
